content_body: My kids and I rented this cabin for a quick getaway. We usually go for the big, glass filled cabin high on the mountain but this time we were looking for something different. From the moment we pulled up it felt like home. Truly. The wildlife, the perfect fluffy grass around the pond and the rich history of the cabin was spectacular. We had the good fortune of meeting the brothers in charge and they added so much warmth to our trip. Every need we had was far exceeded. The cabin itself is cozy and comfy and the beds are ridiculously soft! Highly recommend Andrew, the fishing guide. He was so good with my kids and I got to relax on the swing while they fished downstream. We will definitely be back!
title: Perfect For My Kids and Me
